task: Investigate GitHub fork https://github.com/shivam2014/nyro-reasoning-fix. Use gh CLI (gh repo view, gh api) or web. Find: (1) parent/upstream repo URL (gh repo view shivam2014/nyro-reasoning-fix --json parent,name,defaultBranchRef), (2) fork default branch + latest commit SHA, (3) upstream default branch latest commit SHA, (4) how many commits fork is behind upstream and list the missing upstream commit messages+hashes (use gh api repos/{upstream}/compare/{fork_latest}...{upstream_latest} or commits), (5) upstream clone URL. Report exact hashes and the upstream repo name.
